# Gamma

> AI Registry entry [AIR-26](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-26/gamma) — status **Evaluating** as of 2026-04-02. Departments: marketing.

**Category:** AI Presentation & Content Creation
**Cost:** Free; Plus $9; Pro $18 (API); Ultra $90; Team/Business via sales
**Departments:** Marketing
**Entity:** Gamma Tech Inc. (SF)

## Overview

AI-powered presentation, document, website, social media content creation. Generates polished slide decks, one-pagers, landing pages, social graphics from text prompts or imported content. Uses multiple AI models ([[claude|Claude]], GPT, [[gemini|Gemini]], DALL-E, Imagen, Flux). 50M+ users globally. SOC 2 Type II.

## Key Capabilities

* AI presentation generation — up to 75 cards per prompt
* Website builder with custom domain publishing
* Document/social media creation
* REST API (Pro+)
* MCP server (native Claude/[[chatgpt|ChatGPT]] integration)
* Real-time collaboration
* Custom branding, 100+ themes

## Integrations

* AI: Claude MCP, ChatGPT MCP
* Productivity: Atlassian Rovo, Superhuman Go
* Search: Profound, [[glean|Glean]]
* Automation: Zapier, [[make|Make]], n8n
* Export: PPTX, PDF, PNG, Google Slides
* NO native [[google-workspace|Google Workspace]] Marketplace listing
* NO native Slack App Directory listing

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type II
* DPA available (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA)
* SCCs for EU/UK transfers
* **Data training exclusion: Team and Business plans ONLY** (per ToS §4.5)
* Sub-processors: AWS, GCP, Datadog, Cloudflare, OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure

## Gate 1 Considerations

* **Slack integration gap** — no native app, only Zapier/Make. Potential Gate 1 blocker.
* **Plan-dependent training exclusion** — Team or Business plan needed to satisfy data security
* **Google Workspace integration is export-only** — no Marketplace app

*Evaluating. Marketing-requested.*
